name: james-bond
description: 제임스 본드(James Bond) 모바일 채권정보 웹앱

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace packages/shared-types && npm run build --workspace packages/bond-engine && npm run build --workspace packages/ui && npm run build --workspace apps/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace packages/bond-engine && npm run test --workspace apps/web
